channel.title: Health Edge Daily
channel.description: Daily health and longevity news in 5 minutes. Science-backed health tips, medical breakthroughs, nutrition, fitness, and longevity research every morning.
channel.itunes:author: Health Edge Daily

item.title: Health News Jun 29 — Osteopenia is silently weakening bones in mil
item.description: Breaking news in the world of health: millions of people are silently developing a condition that's weakening their bones, and it's not just about osteoporosis. Osteopenia is a common but often overlooked condition that causes bones to become less dense and more fragile, and because it develops silently, many people only discover they have it after a fracture or bone scan. This is a major concern, especially as we age, because it can lead to a higher risk of fractures and osteoporosis. The good ...

item.title: Health News Jun 29 — Osteopenia is silently weakening bones in mil
item.description: You're just one brittle bone away from a potentially life-altering fracture, and millions of people are living with this reality due to a condition known as osteopenia. It's a silent threat that's often overlooked, causing bones to become less dense and more fragile over time. The scary part is that many people only discover they have osteopenia after a fracture or a bone scan, which is why it's crucial to understand the risk factors. Aging, menopause, a poor diet, and inactivity can all contrib...

item.title: Health News Jun 30 — Scientists may have finally found how Alzheim
item.description: Imagine waking up one day to find that your memory is fading, and no matter how hard you try, you just can't seem to recall the simplest things - that's the harsh reality of Alzheimer's disease, a condition that affects millions of people worldwide. But in a groundbreaking discovery, scientists may have finally found how this devastating disease spreads through the brain. It all comes down to a common brain protein that's giving Alzheimer's an unexpected way to spread, carrying toxic Tau protein...

item.title: Health Edge Daily | Jun 30 — Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's
item.description: Imagine waking up one day to find that your memories are fading away, like sand slipping through your fingers, and there's nothing you can do to stop it - that's the harsh reality of Alzheimer's disease, a condition that affects millions of people worldwide. But what if scientists have finally found a way to slow down its relentless progression? Researchers have made a groundbreaking discovery that a common brain protein may be giving Alzheimer's an unexpected way to spread, carrying toxic Tau p...

item.title: Health Edge Daily | Jun 30 — Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's
item.description: Imagine waking up one day to find that your memories are fading away, and there's nothing you can do to stop it - that's the harsh reality for millions of people suffering from Alzheimer's disease. But what if scientists have finally cracked the code on how this devastating disease spreads through the brain? A groundbreaking study has revealed that a common brain protein may be the key to unlocking the mystery of Alzheimer's progression. It's believed that this protein carries toxic Tau proteins...

item.title: Health Edge Daily | Jul 01 — Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's
item.description: Imagine waking up one day to find your memories slipping away, like grains of sand between your fingers, and being powerless to stop it - this is the harsh reality for millions of people living with Alzheimer's disease, a condition that has long baffled scientists, but a groundbreaking discovery may have finally shed light on how it spreads through the brain. Researchers believe they've found that a common brain protein is giving Alzheimer's an unexpected way to spread, carrying toxic Tau protei...

item.title: Health Edge Daily | Jul 02 — Scientists discover a surprising link between vita
item.description: Imagine being able to support a healthier aging brain with just a simple vitamin - that's what a recent study out of Japan is suggesting, and it's got a lot of people in the medical community talking. Researchers looked at over 2,000 older adults and found that people with lower vitamin C levels in their blood tended to have less gray matter and weaker connections in a key brain network involved in memory, attention, and other cognitive functions. This is a big deal because it suggests that some...

item.title: Health Edge Daily | Jul 03 — Scientists discover a surprising link between vita
item.description: Imagine being able to safeguard your brain health with something as simple as a daily dose of vitamin C. Sounds too good to be true, but new research suggests it's not just a pipe dream. In a study of over 2,000 older adults in Japan, scientists discovered a surprising link between vitamin C and brain health. It turns out that people with lower vitamin C levels in their blood also tended to have less gray matter and weaker connections in a key brain network involved in memory, attention, and oth...

item.title: Health Edge Daily | Jul 04 — Scientists discover a surprising link between vita
item.description: Imagine a world where something as simple as a daily vitamin could be the key to a sharper mind and a healthier brain as we age. New research out of Japan suggests that vitamin C may play a crucial role in supporting a healthy aging brain. In a study of over 2,000 older adults, scientists found that those with lower levels of vitamin C in their blood tended to have less gray matter and weaker connections in a key brain network involved in memory, attention, and other cognitive functions. This is...

item.title: Health Edge Daily | Jul 05 — Scientists discover the deep sleep circuit that bu
item.description: Imagine waking up one morning to find your body has repaired and rejuvenated itself overnight, your muscles stronger, your fat burned, and your brain sharper than ever before - it sounds like the stuff of dreams, but what if it's not just a fantasy, what if it's actually the result of a good night's sleep? Scientists have just made a groundbreaking discovery that reveals the deep sleep circuit that builds muscle, burns fat, and boosts the brain, and it's a game-changer. Researchers have identifi...
